song.title: According to Thy Gracious Word
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) According to Thy gracious word, In meek humility, This will I do, my dying Lord, I will remember Thee.
[V2] 2) Thy body, broken for my sake, My bread from heav’n shall be; Thy testamental cup I take, And thus remember Thee.
[V3] 3) Gethsemane can I forget? Or there Thy conflict see, Thine agony and bloody sweat, And not remember Thee?
[V4] 4) When to the cross I turn mine eyes And rest on Calvary, O Lamb of God, my sacrifice, I must remember Thee.
[V5) 5) Remember Thee and all Thy pains And all Thy love to me; Yea, while a breath, a pulse remains, Will I remember Thee.
[V6] 6) And when these failing lips grow dumb And mind and memory flee, When Thou shalt in Thy kingdom come, Jesus, remember me.
song.author: James Montgomery
